data.title: Kalshi To Power Coinbase New Internal Prediction Platform, Insider Reveals
data.description:
According to a report from CNBC, Coinbase (COIN), the largest cryptocurrency exchange in the US, is preparing to launch its own prediction market in collaboration with Kalshi, one of the largest federally regulated financial exchanges in the country. Coinbase Teases Major Updates The anticipation surrounding the prediction market has been building for nearly a month. Recently, a screenshot of what appears to be Coinbase’s prediction markets dashboard was shared by Silicon Valley researcher Jane Manchun Wong in a post on social media site X (previously Twitter), shedding some light on the features of the forthcoming product. Related Reading: Crypto Market Dips: The Reasons Behind Bitcoin Plunge Below $90,000 Despite FOMC Optimism The Information first indicated on November 19 that Coinbase planned to introduce these prediction markets powered by Kalshi, with a formal unveiling set for the “Coinbase System Update” event scheduled for December 17
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/coinbase/kalshi-to-power-coinbase-new-internal-prediction-platform-insider-reveals/

data.title: Data shows that listed companies and private enterprises have cumulatively increased their holdings by 883,000 BTC since January 2023.
data.description: Since January 2023, publicly traded and private companies have increased their BTC holdings from 197,000 to 1.08 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto derivatives exchange Bitnomial receives CFTC approval to launch prediction market
data.description: Crypto derivatives exchange Bitnomial has announced that it has received approval from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to clear fully collateralized swap contracts, enabling it to offer prediction market services. Currently, the service will focus on two main areas: cryptocurrencies and economic events. In addition, the exchange's clearing function, Bitnomial Clearinghouse, can also provide a wider range of clearing services to its partners' prediction markets, thereby gaining collateral liquidity between the U.S. dollar and cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Public and Private Companies Increase Bitcoin Holdings in 2023
data.description: According to Odaily, public and private companies have significantly increased their Bitcoin holdings since January 2023. The number of BTC held by these entities has risen from 197,000 to 1.08 million.

data.title: Bitnomial Gains CFTC Approval for Fully Collateralized Swap Contracts
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency derivatives exchange Bitnomial has received approval from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to clear fully collateralized swap contracts. This approval enables Bitnomial to offer prediction market services, focusing on cryptocurrency and economic events. Additionally, Bitnomial's clearing function, Bitnomial Clearinghouse, can now provide a broader range of clearing services to partner prediction markets, facilitating collateral liquidity between U.S. dollars and cryptocurrencies.

data.title: ZEROBASE front-end hacked, over 270 users lose USDT
data.description:
Hackers took control of the front-end interface of decentralized zero-knowledge (ZK) proving network Zerobase late Friday, resulting in losses for more than 270 users and draining over $240,000 worth of USDT. According to on-chain investigators Lookonchain, several users reported unauthorized fund movements at around 2:30 PM UTC yesterday, after interactions with what appeared to be […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zerobase-front-end-hacked/

data.title: Pyth Network launches the PYTH token reserve and will conduct monthly token buybacks on the open market.
data.description: Pyth Network announced the launch of the PYTH token reserve, a strategic reserve that operates by using a portion of the network's revenue each month to purchase PYTH tokens on the open market, ensuring predictability and scalability of transactions. Pyth Network added that it currently plans to systematically purchase PYTH tokens on the open market using the over $1 million in revenue generated in the first month of Pyth Pro, and PYTH DAO will also allocate one-third of its funds to purchasing PYTH from the open market.

data.title: The TANSSI team is suspected of minting 45 million tokens, just three weeks after their last large-scale issuance.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, an address suspected to be from the TANSSI application blockchain infrastructure protocol team minted a total of 45 million tokens (worth nearly $700,000) through multiple transactions. This comes only about three weeks after the last large-scale token issuance, in which the team minted and issued 23 million TANSSI tokens, and then sent a portion of the tokens to exchanges.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $49.164 million yesterday, with only BlackRock's IBIT showing net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $49.164 million yesterday (December 12th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $51.128 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $62.732 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) saw the largest single-day net outflow of $1.964 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $12.175 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $118.271 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.57%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $57.904 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $19.4051 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETHA experiencing a net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $19.4051 million yesterday (December 12th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $23.2469 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $13.23 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a net outflow of $22.0982 million. ETH's historical total net inflow has reached $1.489 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $19.42 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Ethereum market capitalization) of 5.22%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $13.088 billion.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Net Outflows
data.description:
According to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicates that on December 12 (Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs experienced a total net outflow of $19.405 million.

The Blackrock ETF ETHA recorded the highest single-day net inflow among Ethereum spot ETFs, amounting to $23.2469 million. The historical total net inflow for ETHA has reached $13.23 billion.

Conversely, the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH saw the largest single-day net outflow, totaling $22.0982 million. The historical total net inflow for ETH stands at $1.489 billion.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $19.42 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 5.22% compared to Ethereum's total market capitalization. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $13.088 billion.

data.title: Data: Approximately 500 million USDC coins have been issued in circulation over the past 7 days.
data.description: According to official data, in the seven days ending December 11, Circle issued approximately 5.8 billion USDC and redeemed approximately 5.3 billion USDC, increasing the circulating supply by approximately 500 million USDC. The total circulating supply of USDC is 78.5 billion USDC, with reserves of approximately $78.7 billion, including approximately $49.7 billion in overnight reverse repurchase agreements; approximately $18.5 billion in Treasury bonds with maturities of less than three months; approximately $9.6 billion in systemically important institution deposits; and approximately $900 million in other bank deposits.

data.title: Two addresses belonging to the same whale transferred a total of nearly 2.3 billion PUMPs to FalconX; selling them could result in a loss of approximately $5 million.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, two wallet addresses belonging to the same whale (9uuDsd and 9jnPPD) transferred a total of 2.299 billion PUMP tokens to FalconX in the early hours of today, worth approximately $6.3 million. Historical data shows that this whale has been continuously accumulating PUMP tokens for more than three months, but entered the market near the price peak, and subsequently increased its holdings during several market corrections. If it sells these tokens now, it may lose approximately $5 million.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Increase Over Seven Days
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 5.8 billion USDC and redeemed around 5.3 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to December 11. This resulted in a net increase of about 500 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 78.5 billion, backed by reserves estimated at 78.7 billion dollars. These reserves include approximately 49.7 billion dollars in overnight reverse repurchase agreements with U.S. Treasury securities, 18.5 billion dollars in Treasury bills with maturities under three months, 9.6 billion dollars in deposits with systemically important institutions, and around 900 million dollars in other bank deposits.
